description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical black can with a matte finish, featuring a large, stylized green 'M' on the front and the words 'MONSTROSITY ENERGY' in bold, edgy font. The can has a standard pull tab on top, colored green, which stands out against the dark background. Around the upper rim, there is small white text warning about age restrictions and caffeine content. The back of the can displays a detailed ingredients list, storage instructions, and manufacturer information in white text. The can's surface is smooth and slightly reflective, with minimal visible wear or damage. The overall design is modern and eye-catching, intended to appeal to a youthful, urban audience.
description: A tall, black cylindrical can with a green 'M' logo, white text, and a green pull tab, designed for an energy juice drink.
description_view_0: The can's side is mostly black with a partial view of the green 'M' and some white text, with the green pull tab just visible on top.
description_view_1: The back of the can shows the full ingredients list, storage instructions, and warnings in white text, with the green pull tab on top.
description_view_2: This side view reveals the edge of the 'M' logo and some of the product information text, with the can's black surface dominating.
description_view_3: The front of the can displays the full green 'M' logo and 'MONSTROSITY ENERGY' branding, with the green pull tab clearly visible on top.
